name: factual-recall-trace
description: Causal-trace where a factual association is stored (ROME-style) by patching clean activations into a corrupted-subject run.
question: Where in the selected model is a factual association stored, and which components are causally responsible for recalling it?
references: Meng et al. 2022, Locating and Editing Factual Associations in GPT (ROME).
